label: Psychic ritual role -- death refusal target
description: Role variant for the target pawn in a death-refusal psychic ritual. Adds a reason string shown when the target leaves due to reaching the maximum death-refusal count.

psychicRitualLeaveReason_MaxDeathRefusal.label: Leave reason (max death refusal)
psychicRitualLeaveReason_MaxDeathRefusal.description: Message shown when the target leaves the ritual because they have reached the maximum death-refusal count.
